a.p: يمكنك اختيار القسم لادخال ملف المواد تلقائيا أو يمكنك رفع ملف مواد خاص بك ويلي ذلك ظهور قائمة اختيار المواد
اختر المواد المراد تسجيلها سواء كلها أو بعضها ويلي ذلك ظهور قائمة اختيار المجموعات
اختر المجموعات كلها أو بعضها حسب المحاضرين والمعيدين

تظهر الاحتمالات الناجحة لتسجيل المواد على صورة جدول دراسي وصورة نصية.
يمكن التنقل بين الجداول وفلترتها حسب عدد أيام الحضور.

div.p:
فيديو يوضح كيفية قيام الطالب بمفرده بعمل ملف مواد خاص به،
ثم تجربته على السكربت لإنشاء الجداول الممكنة لتسجيل هذه المواد،
ثم اختيار الجدول المناسب والتأكد من صحته

div.class: container-fluid px-3 py-2 d-flex flex-column flex-md-row align-items-center justify-content-between gap-2

a.class: navbar-brand d-flex align-items-center gap-2 m-0 text-center text-md-start

div.class: item social d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-center justify-content-md-end align-items-center gap-2

body.script:
// (()=>{"use strict";function e(){console.log("[selectCourses] called, caller:",(new Error).stack.split("\n")[2]?.trim());var e=Array.from(document.getElementById("CourseSelect").selectedOptions),l=document.getElementById("GroupSelect").options;let s=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("#group-checkboxes input"));if(e.length<=0)window.alert("يرجى اختيار مادتين على الأقل");else{console.log("[selectCourses] selected courses:",e.map((e=>e.value)));for(let e=0;ee.value));for(let e=0;e{l[e].hidden=!1,l[e].selected=!1,s[e].parentElement.hidden=!1,s[e].checked=!1}));document.getElementById("group-selectall").checked=!1,console.log("[selectCourses] calling CreateGroupUI() — switching to GroupDiv, hiding CourseDiv"),function(){if(GroupDiv.style.display="flex",CourseDiv.style.display="none",null==document.getElementById("ChangeC")){let e=n(o);e.addEventListener("click",t),HeaderD.insertBefore(e,document.querySelector("#unselectAll"))}document.title="اختيار المجموعات"}()}console.log("[selectCourses] scrolling page by 120px"),window.scrollBy(0,120)}function t(){GroupDiv.style.display="none","flex"==CourseDiv.style.display?CourseDiv.style.display="none":CourseDiv.style.display="flex",window.scrollTo(0,0),document.title="اختيار المواد"}function n({id:e,style:t,type:n,innerHTML:l,onclick:o,Eventtype:s}){let r=document.createElement("button");return r.setAttribute("id",e),r.setAttribute("style",t),r.type=n,r.innerHTML=l,null!=o&&("listener"==s?r.addEventListener("click",o):r.setAttribute("onclick",o)),r}let l={Eventtype:"listener",id:"chooseCourses",style:"display: block; "+t,tableInfo.style.display="block",tableInfo.innerHTML=l;var o=document.getElementsByClassName("celly");for(let e=0;e{allGroups[e].time.split(",").forEach((t=>{let n=` ${allGroups[e].name}`,l=` ${allGroups[e].dr}`;o[TableCellsMap.get(t)].innerHTML=n+"
"+l}))}))}function p(e){const t=e.target;var n=document.getElementsByClassName(t.id)[0],l=n.selectedIndex;let o=Array.from(n.options);if("next"==t.className){if(l<=n.options.length-1){let e=o.filter((e=>0==e.hidden&&e.index>l))[0];if(null!=e){e.selected="selected",u(e.value);let if(l<=0)t.style.cursor="not-allowed",t.disabled=!0;else{let e=o.filter((e=>0==e.hidden&&e.index{e.getAttribute("key")==n?e.style.backgroundColor=i:e.style.backgroundColor=c}))}function e=0;e0&&(l+=n)}})),{totalGaps:l,earliestStart:o==1/0?0:o,latestEnd:s==-1/0?0:s,totalSlots:t.length}}function T(){var I(e){try{return localStorage.getItem(e)}catch(e){return null}}function $(e,t){try{localStorage.setItem(e,t)}catch(e){return null}}function G(e){try{localStorage.removeItem(e)}catch(e){return null}}function N(e,t){try{return JSON.parse(e)}catch(e){return t}}L.addEventListener("change",(function(){const e=this.files[0];if(["text/plain","application/vnd.ms-excel","application/json","text/csv"].includes(e.type)){console.log(e);var t=new FileReader;t.readAsText(e),t.onload=function(t){!function(e,t){let n;"application/json"==t?n=JSON.parse(e):(e.endsWith(";")&&(e=e.slice(0,e.length-1)),n=r(e)),O(n)}(t.target.result,e.type)}}else console.log(e),console.log("Not a Valid type")}),!1),x.addEventListener("click",(()=>{L&&L.click()}),!1);let B=document.getElementById("Dep");B.addEventListener("change",(function(e){const t=B.options[B.selectedIndex].value;validDepValues.includes(t)&&($(M.selectedDep,t),O(r(window.coursesInfo[t])))}));let H=[],q=[];function O(t){for(let o=0;o{t.includes(e.value)&&(e.selected=!0,s++,o[n]&&(o[n].checked=!0,o[n].parentElement.classList.add("selected")))})),console.log("[restoreSelections] restored",s,"courses out of",t.length,"saved"),j(),console.log("[restoreSelections] calling selectCourses() — this will switch to GroupDiv and scroll"),e(),console.log("[restoreSelections] selectCourses() returned — now on GroupDiv view");const r=N(I(M.selectedGroups),[]);console.log("[restoreSelections] savedGroups:",r),Array.isArray(r)&&r.length>0?(console.log("[restoreSelections] applying",r.length,"saved groups"),function(e){const t=document.getElementById("GroupSelect");if(!t)return;const n=new Set(e),l=Array.from(t.options),o=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("#group-checkboxes input"));l.forEach(((e,t)=>{const l=e.getAttribute("regCode"),s=n.has(l);e.selected=s,o[t]&&(o[t].checked=s,s?o[t].parentElement.classList.add("selected"):o[t].parentElement.classList.remove("selected"))})),_()}(r)):(console.log("[restoreSelections] no saved groups"),_()),console.log("[restoreSelections] done")}()}()}function U(){console.log("[persistSelections] called from:",(new Error).stack.split("\n")[2]?.trim());const e=document.getElementById("CourseSelect"),t=document.getElementById("GroupSelect");if(e){const t=Array.from(e.selectedOptions).map((e=>e.value));$(M.selectedCourses,JSON.stringify(t))}if(t){const e=Array.from(t.selectedOptions).map((e=>e.getAttribute("regCode"))).filter(Boolean);$(M.selectedGroups,JSON.stringify(e))}}function j(){const e=document.getElementById("courseSelectionSummary"),t=document.getElementById("CourseSelect");if(!e||!t)return;const n=Array.from(t.selectedOptions);e.innerHTML=`عدد المواد المختارة: ${n.length}`}function _(){const e=document.getElementById("selectionSummary"),t=document.getElementById("GroupSelect");if(!e||!t)return;const n=Array.from(t.selectedOptions);let l=new Map,o=new s=Array.from(l.values()).reduce(((e,t)=>e+t),0),r=Array.from(o.entries()).filter((([e,t])=>t>1)).map((([e,t])=>`${e} (${t})`)),i=r.length?`تكرار المادة: ${r.join("، ")}`:"لا يوجد تكرار";e.innerHTML=`عدد المواد المختارة: ${l.size} | عدد المجموعات المختارة: ${n.length} | مجموع الوحدات: ${s}
${i}`}function F(){G(M.selectedCourses),G(M.selectedGroups),G(M.selectedDep),window.alert("تم مسح الاختيارات المحفوظة")}function R(e,t){e&&e.addEventListener("input",(()=>{const n=e.value.trim();Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(t)).forEach((e=>{const t=e.innerText||"";e.hidden=n.length>0&&!t.includes(n)}))}))}function V(e,t,n){let l=document.createElement("label");l.setAttribute("for",`${n}${t}`),l.setAttribute("class","checkbox-label"),l.innerText=e;let o=document.createElement("input");return o.setAttribute("type","checkbox"),o.setAttribute("index",t),o.setAttribute("id",`${n}${t}`),o.setAttribute("class","checkbox-input"),o.addEventListener("click",(e=>{z(e.target)})),l.appendChild(o),l}function z(e){const t=e.id.includes("group")?"GroupSelect":"CourseSelect";console.log(e.getAttribute("id"));const n=Array.from(document.querySelector(`#${t}`).options);console.log(e.getAttribute("index"));const l=e.getAttribute("index");console.log("[handleCorrespondingOptionOfCheckbox] setting option.selected — this will fire the select change event → persistSelections() call #1"),e.checked?(n[l].selected=!0,e.parentElement.classList.add("selected")):(n[l].selected=!1,e.parentElement.classList.remove("selected")),console.log("[handleCorrespondingOptionOfCheckbox] now calling persistSelections() directly — call #2"),U(),j(),_()}function J(e,t){let n=document.createElement("label");n.setAttribute("for",`${t}-selectall`),n.setAttribute("class","select-all-checkbox"),n.innerText=e;let l=document.createElement("input");return l.setAttribute("type","checkbox"),l.setAttribute("id",`${t}-selectall`),l.setAttribute("class","select-all-checkbox-input"),l.addEventListener("click",(()=>{!function(e){console.log("clicked"),console.log("type",e);let t=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(`#${e}-checkboxes input`));const n=document.querySelector(`#${e}-selectall`);console.log("checkboxes",t),t.forEach((e=>{0==e.parentElement.hidden&&(n.checked?(console.log("selectAllCheckbox is checked"),console.log("selectAllCheckbox.checked",n.checked),e.checked=!0,z(e)):(console.log(" selectAllCheckbox not checked"),e.checked=!1,z(e)))}))}(t)})),n.appendChild(l),n}const P={weekday:"long",year:"numeric",month:"numeric",day:"numeric",hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"};function W(e){return new Date(e).toLocaleDateString("ar-EG",P)}window.form=document.getElementById("zero"),window.CombinationLimit=16e7,window.unitLimit=20,(async()=>{document.querySelector("#invalidMessages").innerHTML+='
\n \n \n
',window.coursesInfo={},window.validDepValues=[];const e=document.querySelector(".form-select");e.disabled=!0,(await(async()=>{const e=await fetch("https://calm-gray-yak-toga.cyclic.app/courses-files");return await e.json()})()).forEach(((t,n)=>{t.index=n.toString(),function(e){const{content:t,description:n,index:l,department:o,createdAt:s}=e;t&&(window.coursesInfo[l]=t,window.validDepValues.push(l),n&&(document.querySelector("#header-note").innerHTML+=`${W(s)} [[ ${o} : ${n} ]]
`),function({name:e,content:t,department:n,term:l,createdAt:o}){document.querySelector("#files-sec").innerHTML+=` \n \n ${n} \n ${l}\n ${W(o)}\n \n \n \n `}(e))}(t),e.appendChild(function({department:e,index:t}){const n=document.createElement("option");return n.innerHTML=e,n.value=t,n}(t))})),e.disabled=!1;try{const t=localStorage.getItem("csgen_selected_dep");t&&window.validDepValues.includes(t)&&(e.value=t,e.dispatchEvent(new Event("change")))}catch(e){}})(),window.codesmap=new window.html2canvas(e),n=document.createElement("a");n.download="schedule.png",n.href=t.toDataURL("image/png"),n.click()}catch(e){window.alert("تعذر تصدير الصورة")}}K.addEventListener("click",(function(){window.print()})),function(){const e=document.querySelector("#Schedule"),t=document.querySelector("#ScheduleDiv");window.addEventListener("beforeprint",(function(n){document.body.style.visibility="hidden",e.style.visibility="visible",e.style.top=0,e.style.left=0,e.style.position="absolute",e.style.padding="30px",t.style.height="0px"})),window.addEventListener("afterprint",(n=>{document.body.style.visibility="visible",e.style.position="inherit",e.style.top="inherit",e.style.left="inherit",e.style.padding="0px",t.style.height="1000px"}))}(),function(){if(!document.querySelector("#ScheduleDiv"))return;const e=document.createElement("button");e.type="button",e.setAttribute("id","exportScheduleImage"),e.innerHTML="تحميل صورة",e.addEventListener("click",Q);const t=document.createElement("button");t.type="button",t.setAttribute("id","exportSchedulePDF"),t.innerHTML="حفظ PDF",t.addEventListener("click",(()=>window.print())),K.insertAdjacentElement("afterend",e),e.insertAdjacentElement("afterend",t)}(),window.downloadCSV=function(e){console.log(e);let t=e.getAttribute("content");if(!t)return;let n=e.getAttribute("name");t=t.replace(/\n/g,"\r\n");var l=new Blob([t],{type:"text/plain"}),o=document.createElement("a");o.download=`${n}.csv`,o.href=window.URL.createObjectURL(l),o.target="_blank",o.style.display="none",document.body.appendChild(o),o.click(),document.body.removeChild(o)}})();
